title: AI-Readiness Audit -- Remediation Plan v1.0
$comment: Companion to audit-schema.json. Joined by audit_id. Sort order convention: priority_tier ascending, effort_estimate ascending (hours/days/weeks), severity_rank descending within the same tier and effort band.

audit_id.$comment: Must match the audit_id in the companion audit JSON. Links the two files.

system_name.$comment: Human-readable name of the audited design system.

schema_version.$comment: Remediation schema version. Independent from audit schema version.

generated_at.$comment: ISO 8601 UTC datetime when this remediation file was generated.

items.$comment: Flat array of remediation items. Sorted by priority_tier ascending, effort_estimate ascending (hours/days/weeks), severity_rank descending within the same tier and effort band.

RemediationItem.$comment: A single remediation action. Carries all fields from audit-schema.json v2.2 RemediationItem plus priority_tier and remediation_type.

action.$comment: What to do. Actionable and specific.

affected_cluster.$comment: Cluster key this action primarily affects.

affected_dimensions.$comment: Dimension keys this action would improve.

effort_estimate.$comment: Order-of-magnitude effort. 'hours' = less than a day. 'days' = 1-5 days. 'weeks' = more than a week.

ownership.$comment: Who is responsible for this action.

priority_tier.$comment: Tier 1: necessary for agent readability (token docs, component descriptions, co-location). Tier 2: high leverage, low effort (parity gap register, usage guidance, doc structure). Tier 3: important but high effort (empty states, responsive coverage, accessibility docs).

remediation_type.$comment: relocate: docs exist externally but not co-located or declared. refactor: component sound but docs missing/thin. rebuild: component structurally poor, must rebuild before documenting.

value_framing.$comment: Optional. Operational consequence of not fixing this item.

impact_categories.$comment: Optional. Impact model categories this action affects.

projected_score_improvement.$comment: Optional. Expected impact on cluster or overall score.

finding_ids.$comment: Optional. Finding IDs this action addresses.
